sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: William Blair initiates Stryker stock coverage citing diversified growth
feed.summary: William Blair has initiated coverage on Stryker Corporation (NYSE:SYK) with an Outperform rating, citing the medical technology giant's diversified growth product portfolio, achieved primarily through strategic mergers and acquisitions. The firm anticipates Stryker will achieve faster sales and earnings per share growth compared to its peers over the next two years, driven by expansion into new markets and enhanced artificial intelligence offerings. Despite a recent 11% revenue growth, InvestingPro analysis indicates the stock is currently trading above its Fair Value.

feed.title: Client Relationship Retention and Steady Sales Momentum Make Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) a Resilient Business
feed.summary: Conestoga Capital Advisors highlighted Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) in its Q4 2025 investor letter, noting the financial technology company's solid fiscal performance, steady top-line growth, and successful contract wins despite industry consolidation headwinds. The firm emphasized JKHY’s consistent sales momentum and ability to secure long-term client relationships as indicators of its resilient business model. While acknowledging JKHY's strengths, Conestoga Capital Advisors also suggested that certain AI stocks might offer greater upside potential.

feed.title: NEOS Investment Management LLC Acquires 79,835 Shares of Kenvue Inc. $KVUE
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC increased its stake in Kenvue Inc. by 49.3%, purchasing 79,835 additional shares, bringing its total holdings to 241,756 shares valued at $3.92 million. Insider Jeffrey C. Smith also made a significant purchase of 3.2 million shares, increasing his ownership to over 27 million shares. Kenvue currently holds an average "Hold" rating from analysts with a target price of $20.08, and pays a quarterly dividend of $0.2075, although it has a high payout ratio.

feed.title: NEOS Investment Management LLC Buys 28,731 Shares of Fifth Third Bancorp $FITB
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC increased its stake in Fifth Third Bancorp by 45.6%, adding 28,731 shares to reach a total of 91,788 shares, valued at approximately $4.09 million. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $56.56, while the company has a market cap of about $34.97 billion and offers an annualized dividend yield of roughly 3.0%.

feed.title: Rahul Dravid Endorses Colgate Total to Champion Oral Health as a Performance Edge
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (India) Limited has announced a partnership with cricket icon Rahul Dravid as the new brand ambassador for Colgate Total. The campaign aims to shift the narrative around oral care, positioning it as a crucial element for peak athletic performance rather than just hygiene. Dravid emphasizes that oral health is a "hidden 1% edge" and an essential part of an athlete's disciplined routine, supported by Colgate Total's Dual Zinc + Arginine technology to prevent common dental problems.

feed.title: American Tower Corporation $AMT Shares Sold by GSA Capital Partners LLP
feed.summary: GSA Capital Partners LLP significantly reduced its holdings in American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) by 52.4% during the third quarter, while major shareholder Tower Corp /Ma/ also sold a substantial block of shares, decreasing their stake by over 91%. The article notes American Tower's high dividend payout ratio of 108.63%, which could impact the sustainability of its 3.7% yield. Analyst ratings for AMT are mixed, with a consensus of "Moderate Buy" and a target price of $218.79.

feed.title: Archer Daniels Midland Company $ADM Stake Boosted by NEOS Investment Management LLC
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC increased its stake in Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) by 38.1%, now owning 66,313 shares valued at $3.96 million, contributing to institutional investors holding 78.28% of the company. The company reported beating quarterly EPS estimates despite a revenue decline, and announced a raised quarterly dividend and FY2026 EPS guidance. Insider activity included a director buying shares and a senior vice president selling shares, with insiders owning 1.2% of the stock.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial $SYF Shares Bought by NEOS Investment Management LLC
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC recently increased its stake in Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) by 42% in Q3, now owning 53,599 shares worth approximately $3.81 million. Synchrony Financial exceeded Q3 EPS expectations, reporting $2.18 against an estimated $2.02, and provided strong FY2026 EPS guidance of $9.10–$9.50. Despite some insider selling, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $87.11, and the company offers a quarterly dividend of $0.30, yielding 1.7%.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial, Inc. $RJF Shares Purchased by NEOS Investment Management LLC
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC increased its stake in Raymond James Financial by 54.6% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 9,100 shares to bring its total holdings to 25,772 shares valued at $4.435 million. Raymond James Financial reported quarterly EPS of $2.86, beating estimates, and announced a dividend of $0.54 per share. Institutional ownership stands at approximately 83.8%, with analysts maintaining a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $182.17.

feed.title: Citi Trends announces board changes with departure and new appointment
feed.summary: Citi Trends Inc. announced changes to its board of directors, with Wes Calvert departing and Benjamin Faw being appointed as a new director and Chair of the Finance Committee. Faw's appointment comes as the company faces profitability challenges, having reported a loss of $2.02 per share over the last twelve months. The changes were made pursuant to a cooperation agreement with Fund 1 Investments, LLC.

feed.title: General Mills, Inc. $GIS Shares Sold by JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. reduced its stake in General Mills (GIS) by 5.8% in Q3, selling 361,965 shares due to earlier guidance cuts and weakening demand. Despite a 7.2% decline in revenue year-over-year, General Mills exceeded quarterly EPS estimates and maintains a quarterly dividend of $0.61, supported by analyst sentiment for its long-term resilience and dividend reliability. The company is strategically repositioning with protein-focused cereals amidst analyst downgrades and a lower consensus target price of $51.37.

feed.title: Soft Demand Weighed on Pool Corp.’s (POOL) Shares
feed.summary: Pool Corporation's shares experienced a decline due to soft demand, primarily impacted by a slower housing market and discretionary spending, as reported by Conestoga Capital Advisors in their Q4 2025 investor letter. Despite these headwinds, the company's maintenance business is performing well, and its scale, distribution advantages, and strong cash generation are expected to support its long-term fundamentals. Pool Corporation is not currently among the top 30 most popular stocks among hedge funds, with hedge fund portfolios holding fewer shares compared to the previous quarter.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Lowers Holdings in Crown Castle Inc. $CCI
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly reduced its stake in Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE:CCI) by 30.2% in the third quarter, selling over 1.1 million shares and retaining approximately 0.59% of the company. This comes as multiple analysts, including JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs, have lowered their price targets for Crown Castle, which currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating. Shares of Crown Castle opened at $86.36, trading within a 52-week range of $77.01 to $115.76, with a market capitalization of $37.61 billion.

feed.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Southern Copper, Freeport-McMoRan, Lundin Mining and Coeur Mining
feed.summary: The Zacks Mining - Non Ferrous industry shows promising prospects due to rising metal prices and increasing demand driven by the energy transition trend. Southern Copper Corp., Freeport-McMoRan Inc., Lundin Mining Corp., and Coeur Mining are highlighted as key companies to watch. These firms are focused on expanding reserves, controlling costs, and improving production efficiency to capitalize on the industry's growth potential amidst strong demand for non-ferrous metals like copper, silver, and gold.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson MedTech reportedly eyes $20B deal to sell DePuy Synthes ortho unit
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson MedTech is reportedly considering selling its DePuy Synthes Orthopaedics business, potentially valued at over $20 billion. The move follows J&J's October 2025 announcement to separate the business to enhance strategic focus and stakeholder value, with "big buyout firms" and other medtech companies reportedly interested in the acquisition.

feed.title: Frontline Sets February Date for Q4 2025 Results and Investor Call
feed.summary: Frontline plc (FRO) has announced that it will release its preliminary fourth-quarter 2025 results on February 27, 2026. This will be followed by a webcast and conference call at 3:00 p.m. CET (9:00 a.m. U.S. Eastern Time) where investors and analysts must register to participate. The disclosure emphasizes the company's commitment to market transparency, and the most recent analyst rating on FRO stock is a Sell with a $171.00 price target.

feed.title: Omnicom Stock Skyrockets 15% on IPG Revenue Boost: Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Omnicom Group (OMC) shares surged 15.36% after reporting a massive Q4 revenue beat, driven by the acquisition of Interpublic Group (IPG). The company exceeded analyst estimates with $5.53 billion in revenue, reflecting the immediate financial benefits of the merger. TIKR's valuation model projects a potential target price of $130.41, indicating a 61.1% upside due to underestimated profitability, operational leverage, and aggressive shareholder returns including a $5 billion share repurchase program.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean appoints new board member
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has appointed Christopher J Wiernicki, former Chairman and CEO of American Bureau of Shipping (ABS), to its Board of Directors. Wiernicki brings over 40 years of experience with expertise in sustainable energy, marine operations, safety, digitalization, and cybersecurity. His appointment supports Royal Caribbean's fleet expansion and investment in destinations, including its new Discovery Class ships and the Royal Beach Club Paradise Island.

feed.title: American Tower Corp expected to post earnings of $1.48 a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: American Tower Corp (AMT) is projected to report earnings of $1.48 per share. This financial forecast comes from Refinitiv as part of an earnings preview. The article is a brief news update detailing this expectation.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Canada Bottling invests $102.9m in Brampton expansion to boost can capacity
feed.summary: Coca-Cola Canada Bottling is investing CAD 141 million (approximately $102.9 million) to expand its Brampton, Ontario facility. This expansion will add a new can production line, increasing capacity by at least 20 million cases annually to help meet growing demand and accelerate product innovation across Ontario and eastern Canada. This marks the largest single investment by the company's ownership group to date, reinforcing their commitment to modernizing supply chain infrastructure and strengthening their position in the Canadian beverage market.

feed.title: William Blair initiates Zimmer Biomet stock rating at Market Perform
feed.summary: William Blair has initiated coverage on Zimmer Biomet Holdings Inc. (NYSE:ZBH) with a Market Perform rating, noting the medical device company's efforts in divestitures and acquisitions have led to 7.2% revenue growth and a 72% gross profit margin over the last year. The firm is impressed with Zimmer Biomet's strengthened product lineup and pipeline, with InvestingPro analysis suggesting the stock is undervalued and expects net income growth this year. William Blair will monitor the progress of a planned U.S. commercial organization transition and its impact on sales, especially given the crucial sales representative and surgeon relationships in the orthopedics sector.

feed.title: PNC Financial Services Group Inc. Has $7.74 Million Stock Holdings in HDFC Bank Limited $HDB
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group Inc. increased its stake in HDFC Bank Limited by 167.8% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to $7.74 million. Other institutional investors like Robeco Institutional Asset Management B.V. and Massachusetts Financial Services Co. MA also significantly boosted their stakes. Despite these increases in institutional ownership, HDFC Bank's stock saw a 1.9% drop and currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts.

feed.title: 4 Analysts Assess Live Nation Entertainment: What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Four analysts have evaluated Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) over the past three months, showing a mixed sentiment with an average price target of $171.75, a 3.26% increase from the previous average. The company demonstrates strong financial performance with impressive revenue growth, net margin, ROE, and ROA, though it carries a high debt-to-equity ratio. Analyst ratings and financial indicators provide a comprehensive overview of Live Nation Entertainment's market position.

feed.title: AI fears are hammering shares of brokers like Charles Schwab and LPL — but the humans aren’t panicking
feed.summary: Shares of brokerage firms like Charles Schwab and LPL Financial are declining due to fears that AI will replace stockbrokers. However, brokers themselves report that clients, especially high-net-worth individuals, are not leaving for AI-driven services and are instead engaging more with their human advisors. This situation echoes the internet boom of the 1990s when online portals were predicted to replace brokers but ultimately did not.

feed.title: BCE to participate in the Barclays Communications and Content Symposium
feed.summary: BCE Inc. (TSX: BCE, NYSE: BCE) announced that Curtis Millen, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will participate in a fireside chat at the Barclays Communications and Content Symposium in New York on Tuesday, February 24, 2026, at 9:10 am eastern. A live webcast of the event will be available on BCE's website. BCE is described as Canada's largest communications company, specializing in advanced fibre and wireless networks, enterprise services, and digital media.

feed.title: HighTower Advisors LLC Cuts Stock Position in IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. $IDXX
feed.summary: HighTower Advisors LLC has reduced its stake in IDEXX Laboratories by 13.3% in Q3, selling 4,259 shares but still holding 27,719 shares valued at $17.71 million. This comes as company insiders also sold 18,180 shares worth approximately $11.63 million, significantly decreasing their individual holdings. Despite these sales, institutional ownership remains high at 87.84%, with other major institutions increasing their positions, and analysts rating the stock a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $783.33.

feed.title: HighTower Advisors LLC Reduces Holdings in Marvell Technology, Inc. $MRVL

Despite this reduction, other significant institutional movements include Norges Bank acquiring a new $716.7 million stake and OVERSEA CHINESE BANKING increasing its holdings by 1,292%. Marvell Technology exceeded its quarterly earnings estimates, reporting $0.76 EPS and $2.07 billion in revenue, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $115.16.

feed.title: HighTower Advisors LLC Sells 140,801 Shares of KKR & Co. Inc. $KKR
feed.summary: HighTower Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in KKR & Co. Inc. by selling 140,801 shares, cutting its holdings by 52.1% to 129,528 shares. This comes despite large insider buying from KKR's CEOs and a director, signaling management's confidence. While KKR missed quarterly EPS expectations, its revenue jumped 76.1% year-over-year, and the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts, though several firms have recently trimmed their price targets.

feed.title: HighTower Advisors LLC Boosts Stake in Expedia Group, Inc. $EXPE
feed.summary: HighTower Advisors LLC increased its stake in Expedia Group, Inc. by 47.1% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 27,890 shares, bringing their total ownership to 87,057 shares valued at approximately $18.61 million. This increase in institutional ownership follows Expedia's strong quarterly performance, where the company surpassed earnings expectations with $3.78 EPS and $3.55 billion in revenue, and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.48 per share. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts, several institutional investors have either increased their positions or initiated new stakes in EXPE, indicating a continued interest in the online travel company.

feed.title: HighTower Advisors LLC Boosts Holdings in Cintas Corporation $CTAS
feed.summary: HighTower Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Cintas Corporation by 12.9% in Q3, adding 9,291 shares to own a total of 81,338 shares valued at $16.7 million. Cintas recently beat quarterly EPS estimates, reported strong revenue growth, announced solid FY2026 guidance, and approved a $1.0 billion share buyback program. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45, reflecting a 0.9% yield, and holds a consensus Wall Street "Hold" rating with an average price target of $218.17.

feed.title: Shell Asset Management Co. Sells 94,713 Shares of Brown & Brown, Inc. $BRO
feed.summary: Shell Asset Management Co. drastically reduced its stake in Brown & Brown, Inc. by 98.5% in the third quarter, selling 94,713 shares and retaining only 1,453 shares valued at $136,000. Despite this, other institutional investors like Bank of New York Mellon, Invesco, Tandem, and Sumitomo Mitsui increased their positions in the financial services provider. Brown & Brown reported strong Q4 earnings, beating EPS estimates and showing a 35.7% year-over-year revenue increase, and maintains a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $90.36.

feed.title: October 16th Options Now Available For Delek US Holdings (DK)
feed.summary: New options for Delek US Holdings (DK) for the October 16th expiration are now available. These new contracts offer potential opportunities for options sellers due to the longer time until expiration. Noteworthy put and call contracts have been identified, presenting scenarios for investors to potentially earn premiums or achieve attractive returns.

feed.title: Stronger, Smarter Power Grid to Improve Reliability for 6,000+ Customers in Berks County
feed.summary: FirstEnergy is upgrading the electric grid in Berks County, Pennsylvania, through the Van Reed 69-kV Transmission Project. This initiative, involving a new substation and a four-mile power line, aims to enhance reliability, reduce outages, and support economic growth for over 6,000 customers. The approximately $30 million project is part of FirstEnergy's larger $36 billion Energize365 investment program to modernize and strengthen the grid across its service area.

feed.title: HighTower Advisors LLC Sells 12,332 Shares of Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated $VRTX
feed.summary: HighTower Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRTX) by 21.9% in the third quarter, selling 12,332 shares and retaining 44,015 shares valued at $17.24 million. Despite the institutional selling, company revenue grew 9.5% year-over-year to $3.19 billion, although EPS slightly missed estimates at $5.03. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $542.00, while insiders have recently sold shares worth approximately $45.8 million.

feed.title: HighTower Advisors LLC Lowers Stock Holdings in Omnicom Group Inc. $OMC
feed.summary: HighTower Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Omnicom Group Inc. by 5.6% in the third quarter, selling 14,560 shares and now holding 244,419 shares valued at approximately $19.93 million. This comes as Omnicom approved a $5.0 billion share repurchase program and declared a $0.80 quarterly dividend, signaling a strong focus on shareholder returns. Despite missing Q4 EPS estimates, Omnicom's revenue increased by 27.9% due to an IPG acquisition, leading to a mixed investor reaction amidst significant institutional ownership and an overall "Hold" analyst consensus.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman Corporation $NOC Stake Cut by Illinois Municipal Retirement Fund
feed.summary: Illinois Municipal Retirement Fund significantly reduced its stake in Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE:NOC) by 57.1% in the third quarter, selling 1,487 shares and retaining 1,118 shares worth $681,000. While some institutional investors increased their holdings, company insiders, including CEO Kathy J. Warden and VP Benjamin R. Davies, also sold substantial amounts of stock. Analysts currently rate Northrop Grumman as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $693.60.

feed.title: Public Sector Pension Investment Board Buys 54,605 Shares of Harmony Biosciences Holdings, Inc. $HRMY
feed.summary: The Public Sector Pension Investment Board increased its stake in Harmony Biosciences Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:HRMY) by 41.6% during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 54,605 shares and bringing its total holdings to 185,803 shares valued at $5.12 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in the company, which currently has a market capitalization of $1.98 billion and an average analyst rating of "Moderate Buy." Insider trading activity included sales by the CEO and CFO totaling over $1.1 million in the last quarter.

feed.title: HighTower Advisors LLC Sells 20,768 Shares of Leidos Holdings, Inc. $LDOS
feed.summary: HighTower Advisors LLC decreased its stake in Leidos Holdings, Inc. by 15.7%, selling 20,768 shares and retaining 111,682 shares valued at approximately $21.1 million. This comes as institutional ownership in Leidos stands at about 76.1%, with diverse changes in holdings among other major investors. Leidos recently reported strong Q4 EPS of $2.76, beating consensus, but revenue missed expectations, leading to mixed analyst sentiment and a cautious outlook despite strategic developments and a set FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: HighTower Advisors LLC Reduces Position in FactSet Research Systems Inc. $FDS
feed.summary: HighTower Advisors LLC reduced its stake in FactSet Research Systems Inc. by 14.9% in Q3, bringing its holdings to 75,025 shares. Despite FactSet beating quarterly estimates, setting FY2026 guidance, and announcing a share repurchase program and a quarterly dividend, analysts have an average "Reduce" rating and company insiders have recently sold significant portions of their holdings. The stock is currently trading below its 50- and 200-day moving averages and its 12-month high.

feed.title: Illinois Municipal Retirement Fund Sells 14,045 Shares of Camden Property Trust $CPT
feed.summary: The Illinois Municipal Retirement Fund significantly reduced its stake in Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) by 69.4% in the third quarter, selling 14,045 shares and holding 6,201 shares valued at $662,000. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, and company insiders sold a total of 54,625 shares worth nearly $6 million over the last 90 days. Camden Property Trust reported mixed quarterly earnings, announced a $600 million share buyback program, and increased its quarterly dividend to $1.06 per share.

feed.title: Public Sector Pension Investment Board Purchases 12,003 Shares of Cardinal Health, Inc. $CAH
feed.summary: The Public Sector Pension Investment Board significantly increased its stake in Cardinal Health, Inc. by 66.7% in Q3, acquiring 12,003 additional shares, bringing its total to 30,007 shares valued at approximately $4.71 million. Other major institutions also expanded their holdings, contributing to a total institutional ownership of 87.17%. Analysts are largely positive, rating the stock a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target price of $244.20, following an earnings beat and an 18.8% increase in quarterly revenue.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. $AJG Shares Bought by HighTower Advisors LLC
feed.summary: HighTower Advisors LLC increased its stake in Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) by 14.5% during the third quarter, acquiring an additional 8,401 shares, bringing its total ownership to 66,340 shares valued at approximately $20.57 million. Despite this institutional buying, analysts hold a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $284.12, reflecting tempered expectations after several firms recently lowered their targets. The company reported better-than-expected Q3 EPS of $2.38, though revenue slightly missed estimates, and it announced an increased quarterly dividend of $0.70 per share.

feed.title: Public Sector Pension Investment Board Buys Shares of 95,000 First Industrial Realty Trust, Inc. $FR
feed.summary: The Public Sector Pension Investment Board recently acquired 95,000 shares of First Industrial Realty Trust (NYSE:FR) for approximately $4.89 million, establishing a 0.07% stake in the company. This comes as First Industrial Realty Trust reported mixed quarterly results, missing EPS expectations but exceeding revenue forecasts and raising its quarterly dividend to $0.50 per share. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in the real estate investment trust.

feed.title: FRO – Invitation to Q4 2025 Results Conference Call and Webcast
feed.summary: Frontline plc (FRO) announced its preliminary fourth-quarter 2025 results will be released on Friday, February 27, 2026. A webcast and conference call will follow at 3:00 p.m. CET (9:00 a.m. U.S. Eastern Time) to discuss these results. Interested participants can access the live event via webcast or by registering for the conference call online.

feed.title: Besi recovers on positive Morgan Stanley comments after guidance-driven selloff
feed.summary: Shares of BE Semiconductor Industries (Besi) rose over 4% after Morgan Stanley reiterated a positive outlook on the company, viewing a recent 7.5% guidance-driven selloff as a buying opportunity. The firm maintained its investment case and raised Besi's price target, supported by strong order momentum, anticipated growth in AI-related advanced packaging demand, and increased EPS forecasts. Morgan Stanley remains cautious on hybrid bonding in the near term but expects significant year-on-year growth for Besi in Q2 2026.

feed.title: PG&E sets April payouts for common and preferred investors
feed.summary: PG&E (NYSE: PCG) has declared its Q1 2026 common cash dividend of $0.05 per share, payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2026. Additionally, its utility subsidiary announced preferred stock dividends for the period ending April 30, 2026, with payments scheduled for May 15, 2026, across eight different series ranging from $0.27250 to $0.37500 per share. The announcement details the specific dates and per-share amounts for both common and preferred stock dividends.

feed.title: Eli Lilly and Company $LLY Stock Holdings Lessened by China Universal Asset Management Co. Ltd.
feed.summary: China Universal Asset Management Co. Ltd. reduced its stake in Eli Lilly and Company by 27.0% in Q3, now holding 5,655 shares worth $4.315 million. Despite this, Eli Lilly exceeded quarterly earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $7.54 and revenue of $19.29 billion, and has lifted its quarterly dividend. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" analyst rating with an average target price of $1,224.69, though competition in the GLP-1 market and pricing risks are noted concerns.

feed.title: Retailer for Black families adds digital investor to board, extends Fund 1 pact
feed.summary: Citi Trends, Inc. announced a series of governance updates including the departure of Wes Calvert from its Board of Directors and the appointment of Benjamin Faw as a new independent director and Chair of the Finance Committee. The company also extended its cooperation agreement with Fund 1 Investments, LLC for an additional year. These changes aim to enhance financial discipline, strategic execution, and long-term shareholder value.

feed.title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. $HLT Shares Sold by Public Sector Pension Investment Board
feed.summary: Public Sector Pension Investment Board significantly cut its stake in Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) by 93.7% in the third quarter, selling over 300,000 shares. Additionally, insider Christopher J. Nassetta sold 114,289 shares for approximately $36.28 million, reducing his ownership by about 75%. Despite these sales, analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Hilton with an average target price of $321.24, and the company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.15.

feed.title: China Universal Asset Management Co. Ltd. Increases Holdings in Gilead Sciences, Inc. $GILD
feed.summary: China Universal Asset Management Co. Ltd. increased its stake in Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) by 4.3% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 161,155 shares valued at $17.88 million. This makes Gilead Sciences the 11th largest position in China Universal Asset Management's portfolio. Despite notable insider selling recently, Gilead reported strong Q4 results, beating revenue and EPS estimates, raising its dividend, and providing optimistic FY-2026 guidance.
